IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (11592605.pdf)
SUMMARY: Dedicated and focused Administrative Assistant with expertise in prioritizing, completing multiple tasks simultaneously, and following through to achieve project goals. Seeking a role of increased responsibility and authority.
SKILLS: administrative, Administrative Assistant, bi, conferences, database, special events, filing, Human Resource Management, HR, Excel, Exchange, Microsoft Office, Office, Outlook, PowerPoint, Word, newsletter, Paralegal, Performance Management, processes, Publications, Recruitment, Strategic Planning, Supervisor, training programs, travel arrangements, Visio, Website, workshops, annual reports

SOURCE: 11592605.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 11/2008 - 08/2014
DESCRIPTION: Managed visa-related employment processes for non-immigrant faculty and staff. Improved productivity and services by developing guidelines and tools. Reduced processing times by 30%. Prepared and submitted USCIS petitions, maintained electronic databases, served as a university point of contact.

SOURCE: 11592605.pdf
JOB TITLE: Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 05/2000 - 11/2008
DESCRIPTION: Provided advice on complex regulatory guidelines. Prepared and filed non-immigrant petitions to USCIS. Maintained confidential data as Designated School Official for J-1 Exchange Visitor Program. Assisted foreign nationals in obtaining H-1B visa status.

SOURCE: 11592605.pdf
JOB TITLE: Coordinator/International Student Advisor/Secretary
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 05/2000 - 11/2008
DESCRIPTION: Drafted meeting agendas and executed follow-up. Managed receptionist area, designed electronic file systems, handled media inquiries. Planned meetings, wrote reports, managed daily office operations.
